title: quercus nana
intro: Quercus nana, also known as the dwarf oak or shrub oak, is a type of evergreen shrub that belongs to the Quercus genus of trees. The leaves of the Quercus nana plant are said to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, due to the presence of tannins and other compounds. The health benefits of Quercus nana include reducing inflammation, acting as an antioxidant, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Quercus nana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
